description_long: This is a modern single-story house with a flat and slightly sloped roof, surrounded by a perimeter fence and featuring a driveway with a car parked at the front. The house has a clean, geometric design with large blue-tinted windows and white exterior walls, complemented by landscaped green areas and several trees. The property includes a paved driveway leading to a garage, and the main entrance is accentuated by a small porch area. The rear of the house opens to a private backyard with additional greenery and a patio space. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, providing both privacy and natural light. The overall layout is compact yet functional, suitable for an urban residential neighborhood.
description: A modern, single-story house with white walls, blue-tinted windows, a flat roof, and landscaped surroundings, enclosed by a fence and featuring a driveway with a car at the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entrance, two trees, and the full length of the house with visible blue-tinted windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped roof, fenced perimeter, and green areas along the side of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view with a car parked at the curb, visible backyard, and asymmetrical window arrangement on the house facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage entrance, more of the roof structure, and additional landscaping along the fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, single door, and minimal overhang, flanked by landscaping and a paved driveway.
